_comment: Example POST /detect response. The base vision fields (entities, poses, model, backend, ...) are unchanged from the legacy contract. risk.v1 fields appear when RISK_ENGINE_ENABLED. temporal_reasoning/scene_context/semantic_corrections/reasoner_status appear when TEMPORAL_REASONING_ENABLED. The VLM is event-triggered and non-blocking: /detect never waits for it.

scene_context.reason: Indoor cafe-like scene with tables, ceiling lights, seating; no construction evidence.

semantic_corrections.reason: The object is attached to the indoor ceiling and does not have vehicle features.
